utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , not much has changed in the last five minutes .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yes it has ! I made cookies !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh that is all right . I am still full from your homemade potato chips .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But you should eat them now because they are hot from the oven .

emotion_cause.span: 4_you should eat them now because they are hot from the oven .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh ... ho ! But not in here ! Can not eat em in bed , remember ? No crumbies !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , I will be out in a second .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I will be out in a second .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That does not lock does it ?
